examples: That's why professionals can see and do things that mystify everyone else.
Of course, you can pause and rewind the film if there are certain bits that really mystify you.
Includes Flying Through Space, Mystify Your Mind, Curves and Colors, Scrolling Marquee, and Blank Screen screen savers.
Some strains cause lesions on the cervix and, for reasons that mystify researchers, some lesions turn cancerous.
You just keep pushing yourselves to succeed in ways that just mystify and leave us all in awe.
